title: Frequently Asked Questions
description: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our
descriptionEnd: or ask your question in the community.

items.question: How do I join the Malagasy community in Germany?
items.answer: Simply create a free account on our platform. Once registered, you will have access to all our services: community, job offers and real estate listings. You can also participate in discussions and events organized by the community.

items.question: How do I post a job offer or apply?
items.answer: Employers can post their job offers for free in the 'Jobs' section. Candidates can browse all available offers and apply directly through the platform. We also facilitate recommendations between community members.

items.question: Can I offer housing or look for a flatshare?
items.answer: Absolutely! Our 'Housing' section allows you to post rental, flatshare or temporary accommodation listings. It's a great way to help newcomers find housing or share costs with other community members.

items.question: What types of help can I receive from the community?
items.answer: Our community offers support in many areas: advice on administrative procedures, help with integration, sharing professional experiences, service recommendations, and much more. Mutual aid is at the heart of our mission.

items.question: Is the platform accessible to Malagasy who stayed in Madagascar?
items.answer: Yes! Our mission is to create a bridge between Malagasy living in Germany and those who stayed in Madagascar. Members back home can also register to share opportunities, maintain cultural ties and facilitate exchanges between the diaspora and the home country.

items.question: Is my personal data secure?
items.answer: Protecting your data is our priority. We comply with European GDPR and never share your personal information with third parties without your consent. You retain full control over the visibility of your profile and your information.
